name: Capital One Spark Cash Plus

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to $2,000 cash bonus — $1,000 once you spend $4,500, $2,000 once you spend $10,000 (first 3 months)

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 2% cash back on every purchase, every day

earning_rates.category: Hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Business Travel
earning_rates.notes: 5% on Capital One Business Travel bookings

other_benefits: Up to $100,000 in free global travel accident insurance

sources.notes: Forbes: high 2% cash-back rate on all purchases, unlimited 5% on Capital One Business Travel
The Points Guy: great cash back for high-spending businesses, 2% on all purchases
CNN Underscored: competitive 2% rate, employee cards earn 2%

notes: Charge card (balance must be paid in full monthly). $150 annual fee. 2% unlimited cash back on everything — best flat-rate business card for spending. Up to $2,000 welcome bonus for high spenders. Employee cards earn 2% and are free. No preset spending limit. For businesses that can pay in full monthly and spend heavily, this is one of the best business cards available. Compare to Spark Cash Select (1.5% no-fee) for lower spenders.
